fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the type of document that the item charge was entered on, that is, the document you were in when you accessed the Item Charge Assignment (Sales) window.
The type in this field dictates which list of documents you are shown in the Document No. field.
The options are:

Quote


Order


Invoice


Credit Memo


Blanket Order


Return Order

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the document that you entered the item charge on, that is, the document you were in when you accessed the Item Charge Assignment (Sales) window.

fields.name: Document Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the line that you entered the item charge on, that is, in the document you were in when you accessed the Item Charge Assignment (Sales) window.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the assignment line. The program fills in the field automatically.

fields.name: Item Charge No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the item charge number of the item charge.
The program copies the contents of this field from the document that you entered the item charge on.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item number on the document line that this item charge is assigned to.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the item on the document line that this item charge is assigned to.

fields.name: Qty. to Assign
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item charge will be assigned to the document line. If the document has more than one line of type Item, then this quantity reflects the distribution that you selected when you chose the Suggest Item Charge Assignment action.

fields.name: Qty. Assigned
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units of the item charge will be assigned to the document line.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit cost on the assignment line. The program uses this field internally.

fields.name: Amount to Assign
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of the item charge that is going to be assigned to the document line.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the document that this document or journal line will be applied to when you post, for example to register payment.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the document that this document or journal line will be applied to when you post, for example to register payment.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the line on the document that this document or journal line will be applied to when you post, for example to register payment.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. Line Amount
fields.tooltip:
Suggests item charge assignment by amount.

This field is used internally.

fields.name: Qty. to Handle
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many items the item charge will be assigned to on the line. It can be either equal to Qty. to Assign or to zero. If it is zero, the item charge will not be assigned to the line.

fields.name: Amount to Handle
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of the item charge that will be actually assigned to the document line.
